stonetop.summary: Horse-borne hunters and warriors who patrol the Steplands and distrust outsiders.

system.concept: Horse-borne hunters and warriors who patrol the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.No8UN1MJEb2mrLXo]{Steplands} and distrust outsiders.
system.description: A typical band of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{Hillfolk} has 6 to 12 riders — adult hunters and warriors who patrol their territory in twos and threes, seeking game and watching for trespassers. The brash will challenge any stranger; the cautious follow unseen and take an outsider's measure before deciding whether to let them pass, spook them off, or murder them in their sleep. When a rider and their horse attack together they deal 1d6+4 (the horse's 1d6+3, +1 for the rider).
